children.name: Product defects
Books list is not displayed
Open the audiobook at the last open chapter and check time code
Navigate by Audiobook
Check end of chapter sleep timer
Check of switching to the next time
Check playback speed and sleep timer
Check time tracking line
Check of not rewinding forward and back by tapping on time bar
Playback speed: Check of playback speed
Playback speed: Check of playback speed

BookName(epub) is not correct. Expected bookName - 'the star of fate', actualName - 'star of fate (9781393308553)'
LYRASIS: Getting and returning books from Book Detail View

Open book to last page read

Switch Library Reservations
